title: DROP-OFF + CLIFFHANGER — 'I LIKE going to the dentist!'
prompt: Medium shot at @front-fence-sidewalk in warm morning light — the gray Tesla Model 3 just pulled up at the curb, rear door open. @Sara on the LEFT hops out onto the sidewalk holding her white @dentist-goodie-bag in one hand. @Eva on the RIGHT hops out behind her, clutching her shiny gold @dental-coin in both hands like the most precious thing she's ever held. @Papa is in the BACKGROUND leaning out the open driver's-side window, grinning a big sly grin. Sara (turning back, curious): "When's our NEXT visit?" Papa (winking, mock-serious through the window): "Six MONTHS." Eva (looking up from her coin, eyes shining, tiny proud determined smile): "Six months? I LIKE going to the dentist." Sara and Eva exchange a wide-eyed grin and run together toward the school out of frame.
